Guise of the Deceiver  
 

No Trade
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 4
CHA: +13
SV MAGIC: +7
Effect: Illusion Dark Elf (Any Slot, Casting Time: 6.0)
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Guise of the Deceiver
No Trade
Slot: FACE
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 4
CHA: +13
SV MAGIC: +7
Effect: Illusion Dark Elf (Any Slot, Casting Time: 6.0)
WT: 0.4 Size: SMALL
Class: BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Illusion
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Grollem
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 03:31:25
Page Updated:Sat Apr 25th, 2026

Expansion: Original
Rarity: No Longer Dropped
Level to Attain: 1
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
King's Court Casino

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Shadow Haven

Formerly dropped by The Ghoul Assassin.

This is dropped by The Ghoul Assassin in the opening days of a progression server.

This is a prize from the Casino (released in GoD) on live and progression servers. You can get Mask of the Deceiver (out of 8 possible items) by giving a Gold Ticket to Jacob Thornblade in Shadow Haven.

There's a trick to increase your chances of getting the Guise of the Deceiver. If you have in your bags some or all of those 6 items from someone else (they are tradeable) then the Gold Ticket would only reward you with one of the 2 other No Trade items, the Glowing Black Drum and the Mask of the Deceiver, or any other tradeable item you don't have in your bags :

- Fungus Covered Great Staff
- Holgresh Elder Beads
- Rubicite Breastplate
- Scimitar of the Mistwalker
- Ton Po's Bo Stick of Understanding
- Vibrating Gauntlets of Infuse (or Vibrating Hammer of Infuse)


Uploaded January 30th, 2021 by QrowMagnon
Updated December 21st, 2025
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 3 Next »

got it today

# Nov 06 2018 at 12:27 AM Rating: Decent

Scholar
20 posts
Bought Golden Ticket with crowns from PoK, then run to Shadowheaven, turn in and receive this from the first try. Kind of luck I think. Now I can be a DE pally. Yeah.

6 posts

▲ Page top
got mine today
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2016 at 2:26 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1673223622746
8 posts
got this from casino golden ticket trade in today. was surprised that my high elf wizard could use this illusion. the item says 'bard/rogue' so i thought only bard/rogue could use it but no, high elf wiz can click it in inventory and use the illusion. very happy.
▲ Page top
got mine today
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2016 at 6:22 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
Symbilein wrote:
got this from casino golden ticket trade in today. was surprised that my high elf wizard could use this illusion. the item says 'bard/rogue' so i thought only bard/rogue could use it but no, high elf wiz can click it in inventory and use the illusion. very happy.



This is the "pre-nerf" version, and has always been clickable by all races/classes despite being flagged bard/rogue.

For some progression servers they have allowed it to drop again (briefly in era, as with circle of shadow and so on) --to my understanding.

To get it from the Casino, just submit enough golden tickets. If you have the other gold ticket reward items in inventory you can force this one. Note that only some of them are tradable (i.e., to make yourself a "kit" to pass around characters to get a mask for each of them).
▲ Page top
Guise of the Deceiver
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2014 at 5:38 PM Rating: Decent
Sparxx
Scholar
187 posts
I can confirm that if you are a Dark Elf, you cannot win a Guise of the Deceiver (with a gold ticket) from the casino. Tried over 1000 times to turn in the last gold ticket, nada.

Switched race to Gnome, and got it almost immediately.

# Nov 02 2010 at 11:51 AM Rating: Default

125 posts
Anyone else having trouble with this quest? I can't seem to turn in my ticket for the guise. I've recieved everything else so far that I can tell.
▲ Page top
gold tickets
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2011 at 8:55 PM Rating: Decent
Cylius
759 posts
You need to keep feeding him the ticket until you get the item you're after. Every time you get the "wheel is stuck" message, that indicates you were awarded an item you already have that is Lore. Keep giving him the ticket, I've had it taken almost 30 hand-ins in order to get what I've wanted.

Edited, Jan 23rd 2011 10:53am by Cylius
▲ Page top
gold tickets
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2011 at 7:38 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1639959435716
125 posts
Duchess Cylius wrote:
You need to keep feeding him the ticket until you get the item you're after. Every time you get the "wheel is stuck" message, that indicates you were awarded an item you already have that is Lore. Keep giving him the ticket, I've had it taken almost 30 hand-ins in order to get what I've wanted.

Edited, Jan 23rd 2011 10:53am by Cylius


I actually had to contact a GM about it. When I got a reply from them, which was surprisingly fast, they told me that I had attempted to turn my ticket in over 600 times!!!

That's either incredibly bad luck or there was something wrong with the quest.
▲ Page top
gold tickets
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2012 at 5:16 PM Rating: Decent
NewbishTroll
Scholar
157 posts
if you have a mask of deception in your bank or inventory (yes that's right, the nerfed version of the guise) then it will block the guise

this is so bards/rogues won't get a guise when they do their hand ins.

I actually tested this with every other casino item + mask of deception and could not get a guise until I ditched the mask of deception.
▲ Page top
gold tickets
QuoteReply

Krittor
3 posts

I got mine after my 6th "gold ticket" turn-in. 2 posts
well anyway my main server is on povar. Ive spent easy over 100k trying to get a golden ticket on there...I ran outta cash, so i went to my old server...bought about 5k worth of tokens. Turned a few in, and got a golden ticket...I was shocked! turned it in and got a DE mask. Few minutes later, got ANOTHER gold ticket, and ended up with holgresh elder beads. Im thinkin it was just pure luck..which is amazing cause i never have any usually =P just sucks because i wanted those on povar!

erp this is in regards to the kings court casino quest BTW

Casino Odds....
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2004 at 3:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592267473538
10 posts
Ok, well I have been obsessed with getting a guise since they nerfed it two weeks before I started hunting in guk. I have thusfar spent 150k on the casino trying to get a guise and only have an insane amount of statfood, a bunch of illusion potions, and beer goggles to show for it.

My question is to you that have gotten one or understand the system somewhat well is... I am prepared to blow another 250k to get a guise (as I said, obsessed), before I destroy the rest of my life savings, what are the chances I will get a guise with the said amount? I hope it is basically guaranteed, but since it is gambling, I understand that it is not, so just trying to get a feel for how much others have had to spend to get one... Thank You.

34 posts
So, with this item do you have to equip it for the effect to work? If you get it from the Casino's that is

RE: So...
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2004 at 8:45 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591768091614
57 posts
No, with the "Guise", you do not have to equip it in order to use it. It's clickable from your inventory...Which is why it no longer drops, but is available from the money pit casino.
